posts.text: @oliveradamslarkin spoke on @hasandpiker show about Florida Atlantic University’s and Florida International University’s 287(g) agreements deputizing campus police officers to conduct warrantless arrests and transport people to ICE facilities. We continue to call on our universities for transparency on what these agreements entail for our campus communities, such as how many officers are trained for immigration enforcement, as well as to rescind the voluntary 287(G) agreement.

We continue to call on our universities for transparency

posts.text:
I had a great conversation with @hasandpiker about building a truly people-powered campaign — and how we can use the Lt. Governor's office to deliver real change for Californians.

We talked about the stakes in this race, the political landscape, and why bold leadership matters right now. Appreciative of the chance to lay out our priorities and engage with people who believe in fairness and an economy that actually serves everyday Californians.

Thanks for the platform, Hasan.

Stay tuned — clip
